title: Switzerland
symbolicOrderDefinition: Draft operational shorthand for the durable shared meanings, legitimacy claims, memory, obligation, and sacrifice logic associated with Switzerland.
symbolicOrderStrengthRationale: Provisional scaffold score based on the case outcome category; requires evidence-chain review before scholarly use.
selectionRationale: Included to test whether symbolic order and institutional embodiment can be restrained by corrigibility, pluralism, and bounded sacrifice.
theoryTest: Tests whether correction capacity can restrain sacralization and sacrificial escalation.
